title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLVII. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
A little old man and I fell out;
        How shall we bring this matter about?
        Bring it about as well as you can,
        Get you gone, you little old man!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCLVII. Gaffers And Gammers.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
